pi_items.source: task.json description and verifier.py fuzzy match logic checking for 'postmortem' or 'evidence'
verifier.py strictly enforces >= 8 count for full score
setup_task.sh limits corpus import to 50 emails and exactly 50 emails exist in assets/emails/ham/
verifier.py loops over these exact keywords

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on 50 real emails sourced from the SpamAssassin Public Corpus. A folder named 'Postmortem-Evidence' (or a name containing 'postmortem' or 'evidence') must be created and populated with at least 8 emails from the inbox. An email draft must be created targeting 'postmortem@sre-team.org' (checked against the 'To' field or email body) containing specific 2-word reference phrases from the collected email subjects and at least one timeline-related keyword.
